reason: Both answers land on the same correct recommendation (short-term contractor to stabilize/migrate, move to managed k8s, avoid single replacement hire) and both miss explicitly calling out longer-term service consolidation. B adds concrete cost/timeline figures that make the reasoning more persuasive and verifiable, and explicitly cautions against overcorrecting into a full replatform (ECS/Cloud Run/Nomad) — a useful piece of judgment A lacks. A is slightly more concise but otherwise covers the same ground with less specificity. Edge to B for added concrete detail and risk-scoping without meaningful padding.
